hero.title: Low-cost massproducible defense systems
hero.copy: Using design-for-manufacturing and first principles to reimagine defense, starting with low-cost strike drones.

section1.title: FPV Drone
section1.body: Propellers: 7 inches. Range: ~20km. Payload: 2kg. Flight time without payload: 30 minutes. Modified ELRS system with an extremely wideband radio that frequency-hops on an encrypted channel. Assembly time under 2 minutes. Almost half the cost of Brave1 drones.

section2.title: Purpose-built for the mission
section2.body: Design-for-automation means our products are non-complex and fast to manufacture. Proprietary SW platform, the same stack powers future fixed-wings and missiles. Hardware built for the specific mission, e.g. kamikaze. Rapidly scalable to million-unit production for FPV drones.

section3.title: Built by people who build things
section3.body: Tenet was founded by people with roots in KTH's rocketry association and manufacturing association, where we built drones and rockets. We have experience from both the military, the manufacturing industry, and the consumer electronics sector. Five people on the team with more on the way.

hero.title: FPV strike drone
hero.copy: A low-cost quadcopter platform built around fast assembly, purpose-built hardware, and a proprietary software stack designed to reduce final unit cost.

productSection.label: Product
productSection.title: Built for cost, speed, and repeatable production
productSection.copy: The FPV drone combines simple mechanical assembly with a modified ELRS radio system and mission-specific hardware. The result is a product intended for rapid manufacturing and field-ready deployment.

cost.label: Cost position
cost.value: Almost half the cost of Brave1 drones

production.title: Production speed
production.copy: Design-for-automation creates non-complex products that are fast to manufacture and assemble with all components included.

software.title: Modular software
software.copy: A proprietary software platform provides the foundation for the FPV drone and future low-cost fixed-wing and missile systems.

hardware.title: Purpose-built hardware
hardware.copy: Hardware is designed around the specific mission profile rather than adapted from a generic platform.

manufacturing.title: Distributed manufacturing
manufacturing.copy: The product is built for dispersed production and rapid scalability toward million-unit FPV drone manufacturing.

roadmapSection.label: Roadmap
roadmapSection.title: From current FPV platform to autonomous swarm systems
roadmapSection.copy: The roadmap extends the same software foundation across additional airframes and progressively more autonomous mission capability.

fixed.title: Fixed-wing, SIB & Vampire
fixed.copy: Low-cost drones on the same software platform.

autonomy.title: Autonomy
autonomy.copy: Autonomous navigation, detection, and target seeking.

swarm.title: Swarm
swarm.copy: Mass-produced drones operating in coordinated swarms.

hero.title: Get in contact
hero.copy: Reach out to discuss procurement, partnerships, or press inquiries. We will route your message to the correct channel and respond within 24 hours.

form.title: Send a message
form.copy: Fill in your details below. These messages are handled through encrypted channels.
form.note: Your message will be routed to the correct channel. We respond within 24 hours on business days.

details.title: Contact details
details.copy: For direct inquiries, use the channels below. We are based in Stockholm and operate Monday through Friday.
